part_name: generate the ARIA ratchet ring: outer diameter 213mm, inner diameter 120mm, thickness 21mm, material 4340 steel, 12 ratchet teeth evenly spaced on outer circumference, each tooth has asymmetric profile: drive face at 8 degrees from radial, back face at 60 degrees from radial, tooth height 8mm from root to tip, tooth tip flat 3mm wide, use rotate+union loop to pattern teeth around ring, 6x M6 bolt holes on 150mm bolt circle evenly spaced
